/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/core/detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/core/kalman_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/core/pid_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/core/tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/hardware/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/hardware/serial_comm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/utils/config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_tracker.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o -o vision_tracker  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_dnn.so.4.6.0 -lyaml-cpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.6.0
